proof: function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or (if x0 = x3 { 1 + x1.count(x3) } else { x1.count(x3) }) = x2.count(x3) }[A](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), head)
